purpose: Generator != verifier record for the T7b validation artifact. Provenance only: it records that the lead independently observed the artifact's integrity + representative gates. It contains NO gate reinterpretation and NO T8/selectability decision. It contains no host name, user name, absolute/home path, session/frame id, or workspace locator.

artifact_verified.byte_identical_note: verified identical by raw SHA-256 across every copy the lead inspected; the copy locations are internal and intentionally omitted from this release artifact.
artifact_verified.identity_note: raw file SHA-256 is authoritative; the artifact's self-declared canonical hash is carried but not independently reproduced (its canonicalization recipe was not re-derived), consistent with pre-flight rule 2.

controls_v3_csv_raw_sha256.provenance: artifact loaded controls from the committed controls_v3.csv; confirmed by artifact integrity primary_redraw_matches_committed=true

input_h5ad_canonical_sha256.status: ARCHIVED Phase-1 diagnostic (not a current verified hash)

independent_recomputations.reproducibility_note: These checks were computed independently by the lead this session but are NOT reproducible from the committed release artifacts alone: they require the pinned input h5ad (raw SHA-256 in inputs_by_hash.h5ad_raw_sha256; fetchable at the pinned HF revision e5fcf98b56a9302921d402e97fc5a190bd88f9a6), a numpy/scipy/pandas/h5py/pyarrow environment, and non-trivial compute. The independent verifier code is NOT committed. This record therefore asserts INDEPENDENT OBSERVATION, not a from-release reproducibility guarantee.

environment_identity.captured_from: the conda interpreter that actually ran the independent scripts this session

checks.name: controls_reconstruct
checks.method_semantics: recompute per-gene mean of the pinned pre-normalized/log1p .X matrix (author-provided median-total-normalized ~9819 + log1p; no raw-counts layer) via chunked float64 CSR column-sum over all 396k -> divN bins -> detected-minus-marker eligible pool -> keyed SHA-256 draws; compare to committed controls
checks.denominator: 2100 control rows across 11 primary programs + activation_predictor

checks.name: bins_acceptance
checks.method_semantics: load committed bins; compare marker-bin assignments and per-occupied-bin candidate_counts to the Phase-1 checkpoint; reconstruct all controls
checks.denominator: 53 marker genes; all occupied marker bins; 2100 controls
checks.observed: marker_bins 0 mismatches; occupied-bin candidate_counts 0 mismatches; 2100 controls reconstruct

checks.name: scores_generator_integrity_artifact_reported
checks.provenance: GENERATOR self-check reported by the artifact (field integrity.primary_score_exact_equal_after_5dp_round in stage01_validation.json); NOT an independent lead computation

checks.name: scores_lead_independent_sample
checks.provenance: LEAD independent recompute from the pinned pre-normalized/log1p .X matrix (author-provided median-total-normalized ~9819 + log1p; no raw-counts layer) + committed controls (distinct from and much smaller than the generator check above)
checks.denominator: 250 unique cells x 11 programs = 2750 score values, plus 250 activation-adjusted residuals, plus 6000 overlay-vs-full value comparisons over 40000 overlay cells
checks.observed: sampled scores max abs err vs emitted = 4.999999999949489e-06 (<= 5e-6 inclusive; consistent with exact-after-5dp because scores are stored at 5dp); actadj sample max abs err 4.999999999949489e-06; overlay==full max abs err 0.0; one summary median matched
checks.claim_scope: this independent result claims ONLY the 2750 sampled score values (+250 actadj, +6000 overlay comparisons) it actually recomputed, NOT the full 4356000-value population

checks.name: gate_lomo_failing
checks.method_semantics: cell-level LOMO (Spearman of panel_mean_full vs panel_mean_minus_gene, average ranks no p-value; median|delta|/IQR) per donor at a condition; report worst over markers x donors
checks.denominator: th1_like (4 markers) and cd4_ctl_like (6 markers), each x 4 donors, at condition Rest
checks.observed: th1_like|Rest worst rho=0.764173 (D1), ratio=0.584872, matching the artifact values 0.7641729607325386 and 0.5848723435562414 to 6 dp; cd4_ctl_like|Rest also FAIL independently

checks.name: gate_passing_and_advisory
checks.method_semantics: condition_measurability (score IQR>0 and >=2 panel genes detected in >=1% cells per donor); pair_redundancy (|Spearman(A,B)|>=0.90 in >=3/4 donors)
checks.denominator: cd4_ctl_like|Rest x 4 donors; th1_like~treg_like|Rest x 4 donors
checks.observed: condition_measurability cd4_ctl_like|Rest PASS; pair_redundancy th1_like~treg_like|Rest |rho|>=0.90 in 0/4 -> not redundant (matches artifact)

independent_recomputations.follow_up_proposal: To upgrade these to reproducible-from-pinned-input, commit a single clean, path-parameterized, no-leak verifier under 01_programs/analysis/ (inputs by argument, not hardcoded), record its code SHA-256 + exact environment lock + the input hashes above, as a separately reviewed step. Not done in this preservation commit.

t7b_outcome_recorded_as_is.stage1_selectable_by_condition: 0 of 33 (every program x condition fails the pre-registered cell-level LOMO gate)
t7b_outcome_recorded_as_is.stage2_base_portability: 10/11 pass; th9_like fails (0 panel genes in effect universe)
t7b_outcome_recorded_as_is.overlay_release: not_ok (1 overlay_distributions failure; blocks overlay release only, separate from selectability)
t7b_outcome_recorded_as_is.note: This is the honest result of the pre-registered gate AS WRITTEN. No panel/threshold/control/seed retuning was performed. Any reclassification or additional test is a separate proposal and is NOT applied here.

no_reinterpretation_assertion: This record and the accompanying validation artifact preserve the pre-registered gate's output verbatim. No gate reinterpretation, no T8 decision, no manufactured selectable pair.
